title: Hegseth will headline a campaign rally next week in the home district of a soldier killed in the Iran war.
summary_full: The defense secretary planned to appear at a “Top Gun”-themed event for Representative Zach Nunn, Republican of Iowa, in the district where all four fallen soldiers had been stationed.
summary_public: The defense secretary planned to appear at a “Top Gun”-themed event for Representative Zach Nunn, Republican of Iowa, in the district where all four fallen soldiers had been stationed.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: soldier killed in the Iran war
